memberdef.argsstring: (FName Key, const TArray< FString > &Value, EOnlineDataAdvertisementType::Type InType, int32 InID)
memberdef.name: Set

detaileddescription.para: Sets a key value pair combination that defines a session setting with an ID

detaileddescription.para: Gets a setting value by its name

parameterdescription.para: settings object to get the value from

simplesect.para: an boolean indicating whether the value was retrieved

detaileddescription.para: Get a session setting double value as an integer. Session settings across the OSS are stored as a double. However, due to limitations with FVariantData, integers cannot be retrieved from these double values, even if they are within range.

parameterdescription.para: session settings object to fetch the setting from
setting key that we want to read
output value that will be returned to the caller

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if an integer could be grabbed, or false otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Get the ESessionSettingsAccelByteArrayFieldType for a field

parameterdescription.para: settings to get the type from
